[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011111 5
1 1001111 5
2 0010000 1
3 1111100 5
4 1001000 2
5 0100101 3
6 1100101 4
7 1111111 a

01 10 0010000 1 match 2
12 21 1001000 2 match 4
23 32 0000000 a
34 43 0100101 3 match 5
45 54 1100101 4 match 6
56 65 0011111 5 match 0
67 76 0001111 4
70 07 0000000 a

02 20 0000000 a
13 31 0100100 2
24 42 1000000 1
35 53 0100101 3 match 5
46 64 0000101 2
57 75 1001111 5 match 1
60 06 0010000 1 match 2
71 17 1001100 3

03 30 0000000 a
14 41 1100100 3
25 52 1001000 2 match 4
36 63 0000101 2
47 74 1000101 3
50 05 0010000 1 match 2
61 16 0011100 3
72 27 1001000 2 match 4

04 40 0000000 a
15 51 1111100 5 match 3
26 62 0001000 1
37 73 0000101 2
